reviews.review_title: Devs please don't give up on this game
reviews.review_description:
Please make the game cheaper too cos I've paid all of that thinking this was a good game but it turns off the game is filled with bugs and glitches.

Please add more stuff to your game.

If you like puzzles and tricks for pipe games - here it is! Certainly you can further develop, e.g. better grip, choice of levels,, some animation after the correct arrangement of pipes (there is a voice that declares the state). Overall fun and keep working!
This game brings nostalgia if you love the classic pipe flow puzzles, and it’s huge must have game. Well done😎
